prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins on a completely black screen.

After several seconds, the image fades into a very dark, industrial-looking interior, resembling a large warehouse or hangar. The space is mostly in shadow. Overhead rectangular skylights or ceiling lights are faintly visible, forming a grid-like pattern near the top center. The side walls have tall panel-like structures or windows, but details are obscured by low lighting. The floor appears glossy or reflective, though most of it remains dark.

The next frame reveals a large illuminated “verizon” wordmark centered in the same industrial space. The letters are bright white, set in lowercase, with a red checkmark to the right of the word. The glossy floor reflects the white letters and the red checkmark, creating a mirror-like effect below the logo. The background remains a dim warehouse interior with overhead light panels and dark structural elements.

The scene then returns to a darker view of the same interior without the visible logo. The space is again mostly shadowed, with only the ceiling lights and faint outlines of the walls and central structure visible.

Later, the “verizon” logo appears again in the same setting, now large and centered. The white lettering and red checkmark stand out strongly against the dark industrial background. The reflective floor again shows elongated reflections of the logo.

The commercial ends by cutting back to black, with the final sampled frames showing a blank black screen.
